svg.title: RAG pipeline: from user query to grounded answer
svg.desc: A flowchart showing two parallel paths — the naive LLM path that hallucinates, and the RAG path that retrieves real documents before generating an answer. The RAG path goes through an embedding model, vector database, retrieved chunks, and finally the LLM with context to produce a cited answer.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why do LLMs hallucinate without retrieval?')
sendPrompt('What does an LLM hallucination look like?')
sendPrompt('What is query embedding in RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does a vector database work in RAG?')
sendPrompt('What are document chunks in RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does the LLM use retrieved context to answer?')
sendPrompt('How does RAG produce cited answers?')
